claims.summary: bridge_dynamic_stale_window_ms must not falsely mark high-entropy reflective silence stale; high pressure/high entropy should extend the waiting window rather than shrink it.
pressure_trend_samples_v1 should stay bounded to the current smoothing window rather than grow linearly over time.
